case_title: LERNER, TAMBOR BLACK INC VS URGHART, BELINDA ANN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $346.52 FILED BY LERNER, TAMBOR BLACK INC AS TO DEFENDANT URGHART, BELINDA ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LERNER, TAMBOR BLACK INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URGHART, BELINDA ANN $86.63 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $128.63, NO PUNITIVE OR TREBLE DAMAGES BECAUSE PLTF FAILED TO SHOW THAT DEFT KNOWINGLY & WILLFULLY INTENDED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
